title: Legacy product compatibility
summary: legacy product planner read/delete, v1 optional stable-key rollout, current/immediate-previous version dispatch와 flag-off seeded-v2 drain을 파괴적 tombstone 없이 검증한다.
goal: 기존 planner/product/cooking 계약을 보존하면서 호환 telemetry와 rollback evidence를 만들고, 별도 승인 없는 row·endpoint·parser·cursor 제거를 fail closed한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, security and compatibility reviewer, five-axis reviewer, design-impact reviewer, implementation, Stage 3/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: planner-shell Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1084; its runtime/current-head checks are a direct implementation predecessor
meal-log-ui Stage 1 docs/runtime closeout is a direct implementation predecessor; #13 Stage 1 may lock docs now but implementation still waits for its merged runtime/current-head green
existing version-dispatch batch and session contracts remain unchanged

external_smokes: legacy product planner owner read pinned detail and delete
no add edit auto-migrate current-repin or planner nutrition UI call
optional stable key old-shape no-key telemetry and post-zero 428
flag-off seeded-v2 read cancel complete and rollback drain
cursor v1 dual decode and compatibility endpoint inventory
tombstone denied without separately approved contract

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security authorization and compatibility review
separate Codex design-impact review confirming no new visual authority surface
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: Destructive row endpoint parser cursor or planner nutrition tombstone
Retention period background auto-delete migration or production cleanup job
Product planner add edit copy shopping cooking leftovers XP status or meal-log migration UI
New product detail route or mutable-current nutrition repin
Snapshot-v2 or personal recipe write activation
PLANNER_WEEK COOK_MODE HOME MEAL_LOG or batch lifecycle composition changes
New endpoint field status error enum migration or direct DML
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/compatibility, five-axis and design-impact reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; runtime/E2E/browser/telemetry/remote evidence is future. Implementation waits for #10 and #12 runtime/current-head green. #13 preserves contracts and records prerequisites but does not authorize deletion or R+2 activation.
